guardrail: human-verified propositions of law only; operational facts excluded by construction

filter.description: Lawyer-citable: a proposition of law (tier1_legal), currently in force, confirmed against the official statutory/regulatory text (resolution_text). Operational/market facts (tier2_operational) are excluded by kind even when well-sourced; draft provisions are excluded by status; unverified legal points are excluded by evidence_tier.

data.instrument: CBUAE PTSR (Circular 2/2024)
data.pinpoint: Distribution — channel restriction; free-zone issuers carved out of onshore perimeter

data.instrument: CBUAE PTSR (Circular 2/2024); VARA / ADGM-FSRA / DIFC-DFSA frameworks
data.pinpoint: Issuer pathways — DPT (CBUAE-licensed); FPT (foreign, VA/derivative-only); bank subsidiary; free-zone cannot issue AED

data.instrument: CBUAE Payment Token Services Regulation (Circular 2/2024)
data.pinpoint: Channel restriction — merchants may accept only CBUAE-licensed Dirham Payment Tokens for goods/services; foreign tokens VA/derivative-only

data.instrument: CBUAE PTSR (Circular 2/2024); ADGM-FSRA FRT framework
data.pinpoint: Yield — prohibited onshore; ADGM permits reserve income but bans investment/savings promotion

data.instrument: CBUAE Payment Token Services Regulation (Circular 2/2024); VARA / ADGM-FSRA / DIFC-DFSA frameworks
data.pinpoint: Regulators — CBUAE onshore; VARA / ADGM-FSRA / DIFC-DFSA free zones

data.instrument: CBUAE PTSR (Circular 2/2024); ADGM FRT framework
data.pinpoint: Reserve/backing — 100% segregated in UAE banks; bank-subsidiary >=50% cash + UAE govt bonds/CBUAE bills

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 44 (Travel Rule) + Art. 89 (two-stage phase-in: domestic by Feb 2027, international by 2 Feb 2028) + Art. 88 (authorisation adjustment period — 270-day adequação; internal controls / cybersecurity / Law 13.810/2019); Res BCB 521/2025 (KYT / self-hosted wallets)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (PLD/FTP obligations on SPSAVs; ≥3 responsible administrators including AML/CFT; GAFI Recs 15-16 alignment); Lei 14.478/2022

data.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022; BCB regulations
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 20 (besides SPSAVs, only commercial/exchange/investment/multiple banks, Caixa, CTVM/DTVM and FX brokers may provide intermediation/custody, with restrictions); Art. 4 (SPSAV modalities)

data.instrument: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025; Res BCB 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025) — SPSAV minimum-capital methodology
data.pinpoint: Resolução Conjunta CMN/BCB nº 14/2025 + Res BCB nº 517/2025 (both 3 Nov 2025): minimum capital R$10,800,000 to R$37,200,000 scaled by the set of activities performed

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 — patrimonial segregation (segregação patrimonial)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (patrimonial segregation: client funds in individualised payment/deposit accounts; client virtual assets in segregated wallets; foreign-custodian conditions — home-country authorisation/supervision, Brazil representative, enforceable guarantees, formal segregation of Brazilian clients' assets)

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof-of-reserves + biennial independent audit + published reports); Res BCB 521/2025 Art. 82-A (monthly BCB reporting); IN BCB 701 (22 Jan 2026)
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 (proof of reserves; periodic audits; transparent information flows); Res BCB 521/2025 (monthly FX-operations reporting from 4 May 2026)

data.instrument: Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation regime); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (provider modalities)
data.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022 (BCB authorisation required to provide virtual-asset services); Res BCB 519/2025 (authorisation process); Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 4 (three SPSAV modalities: intermediária, custodiante, corretora), Art. 14 (sociedade limitada/anônima; ≥3 administrators; head office in Brazil); authorisation deadline 30 Oct 2026 (270 days)

data.instrument: Res BCB 521/2025 (FX reclassification + caps); Res BCB 561/2026 (eFX exclusion); Lei 14.286/2021
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 521/2025 (amends Res 277/278/279 of 31 Dec 2022): virtual-asset services brought into the FX market — international payments/transfers, stablecoin trades, and payment of expenses abroad treated as câmbio operations; monthly reporting to the BCB from 4 May 2026

data.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 (Marco Legal dos Ativos Virtuais); Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB as VASP authority; CVM carve-out for securities tokens)
data.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022 arts. 2-9; Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB designated competent authority for virtual-asset services; CVM retains jurisdiction over tokens that are securities)

data.instrument: Res BCB 520/2025 — stablecoin definition + asset-curation / listing-policy rules
data.pinpoint: Res BCB 520/2025 Art. 2, III (reserve assets of a fiat-referenced token = the fiduciary currency and public debt issued by the same governments); Arts. 64+ (asset curation; algorithmic-stablecoin prohibition; proof of reserves)

data.instrument: Lei 14.478/2022 + Decreto 11.563/2023 (CVM carve-out); CVM Parecer de Orientação 40; Resolução CVM 175 (investment funds)
data.pinpoint: Lei 14.478/2022; Decreto 11.563/2023 (BCB over payment/VASP activity; CVM jurisdiction preserved over tokens with securities characteristics)

data.instrument: FINMA Guidance 06/2024; Anti-Money Laundering Act (AMLA)
data.pinpoint: AML — identify every holder incl. intermediate holders; anonymous transfers prohibited

data.instrument: Banking Act Art. 1b (FinTech licence); Banking Ordinance Art. 5(3)(f) (deposit exclusion); FINMA Guidance 06/2024
data.pinpoint: Issuer pathways — licensed-institution vs bank-guarantee exemption (BankO Art. 5(3)(f))

data.instrument: FINMA Guidance 06/2024 (no usage cap); Banking Act framework
data.pinpoint: Monetary sovereignty — no usage cap; foreign-currency tokens unrestricted

data.instrument: FINMA Guidance 06/2024; Banking Ordinance Art. 5(3)(f)
data.pinpoint: Yield permitted; bank guarantee must cover interest (structural constraint, not prohibition)

data.instrument: Banking Act and Banking Ordinance; FINMA Guidance 06/2024 (Stablecoins)
data.pinpoint: FINMA as primary stablecoin supervisor; SNB for systemic FMIs; no bespoke statute

data.instrument: Banking Ordinance Art. 5(3)(f); FINMA Guidance 06/2024; Collective Investment Schemes Act (CISA)
data.pinpoint: Reserve/backing — no statutory schedule; guarantee covers principal + interest; CISA characterization risk

data.instrument: Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA), Art. 58(3) (applying the Art. 23 means-of-exchange thresholds to non-EU-currency EMTs)
data.pinpoint: Art. 58(3) (applying Art. 23 mutatis mutandis to non-EU-currency EMTs)

data.instrument: Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA), Article 50
data.pinpoint: Art. 50 (no interest paid to EMT holders)

data.instrument: Regulation (EU) 2023/1114 (MiCA)
data.pinpoint: Titles III/IV; EBA/ESMA/NCA supervisory architecture

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), capital requirements
data.pinpoint: HK$25m paid-up capital (statutory)

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), offering / distribution restrictions and offence provisions
data.pinpoint: permitted-offeror closed loop; HK$5m / 7-year offence

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), licensing provisions
data.pinpoint: licensable regulated activities; s.8(1) licensing offence

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656) — HKD-referencing perimeter + non-HKD FRS professional-investor restriction
data.pinpoint: offshore HKD-referencing issuance is licensable; non-HKD FRS offering limited

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), Schedule 2, s.15 (Non-interest bearing)
data.pinpoint: Sch. 2 s.15 (no interest on issued stablecoins)

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), redemption requirements
data.pinpoint: par redemption within 1 business day

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), in force 1 Aug 2025
data.pinpoint: HKMA as the licensing/supervisory authority

data.instrument: Stablecoins Ordinance (Cap. 656), reserve / backing requirements
data.pinpoint: 100% backing; same-currency reserve with HKD/USD exception; segregation/trust

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (2022 amendment); FSA AML framework
data.pinpoint: AML — FATF travel rule operative; intermediary cold storage / trust segregation / liability-sharing

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
data.pinpoint: Distribution — foreign tokens handled via a registered EPIESP holding JP reserves equal to customer holdings; foreign issuer may not issue/redeem/solicit to JP users

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
data.pinpoint: Issuer pathway — closed trichotomy (bank / funds-transfer / trust); intermediation via registered EPIESP

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
data.pinpoint: Monetary sovereignty — no cap; foreign tokens admitted via registered EPIESP holding JP reserves

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
data.pinpoint: Yield — holders not remunerated; issuer earns reserve interest

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
data.pinpoint: Redemption — at par on demand; funds-transfer-type JPY 1,000,000 per-transfer cap

data.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime, in force 1 Jun 2023) as amended by Act No. 66 of 2025
data.pinpoint: Regulators — FSA single supervisor; Local Finance Bureaus by delegation

data.instrument: Act on Reporting and Use of Specific Financial Transaction Information; Virtual Asset User Protection Act
data.pinpoint: AML — Travel Rule + VASP registration for stablecoin-to-fiat conversion for third parties

data.instrument: Money Laundering Control Act (as amended) + VASP Registration Regulations (in force 30 Nov 2024)
data.pinpoint: Money Laundering Control Act (洗錢防制法) Art. 6 (amended 31 Jul 2024); VASP registration regime in force 30 Nov 2024 (non-registration: up to 2 yr + NT$5m individuals / NT$50m entities); VASPs classified into 5 types

data.instrument: Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act (GENIUS Act)
data.pinpoint: GENIUS Act Sec. 3-4 (permitted payment stablecoin issuers: IDI subsidiaries; OCC-qualified non-banks; certified state regimes)

data.instrument: GENIUS Act §4(a)(11); OCC NPRM §15.10(c)(4) / anti-evasion §15.10(c)(6); FDIC NPRM §350.3(b)(4); CLARITY Act (H.R. 3633) §404(c)(1) (Tillis-Alsobrooks text, 1 May 2026; affirmed final 5 May 2026)
data.pinpoint: GENIUS Act Sec. 4(a)(11) (no interest/yield in connection with holding, use, or retention)

data.instrument: GENIUS Act Sec. 4(a)(1) (1:1 fair-value reserve backing)
data.pinpoint: GENIUS Act Sec. 4(a)(1) (1:1 fair-value backing of outstanding payment stablecoins)

data.instrument: Reves v. Ernst & Young, 494 U.S. 56 (1990); SEC v. W.J. Howey Co., 328 U.S. 293 (1946); Investment Company Act of 1940 (registered MMFs); CLARITY Act market-structure provisions (pending)
data.pinpoint: GENIUS Act securities carve-out (amending the '33/'34 Acts and ICA40 for permitted payment stablecoins)
